'''鈭歜-zh-z-r''' ('''kabazhzeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rideshare|rideshare]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rideshare|rideshare]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-zh-z-r
|-
! Lemma
| kabazhzeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibazhzeroko|thibazhzeroko]] || [[word:jibazhzeroko|jibazhzeroko]] || [[word:shibazhzeroko|shibazhzeroko]] || [[word:kibazhzeroko|kibazhzeroko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
